RichText.Text: 1. recover a wide range of prized possessions 2. a suspect suspect sb/sth. to be suspect sb. of sth. 3. cross-reference 4. a recent study reveals that... 5. challenge the idea that... the challenged idea 6. be entirely separate from each other separate...from... separation (n.) 7. raise questions about ... 8. how our mental abilities relate to each other relate what you are studying to daily life tasks related to reading 9. involve sth./doing sth. get involved in 10. vice versa=the other way around

TextRun.Text: 你所学的知识与日常生活
10. 反过来也一样，反之亦然

RichText.Text: 1. 找回大量珍贵的财物 2. 嫌疑人 怀疑某人/某物是…… 怀疑某人做了某事 3. 相互对照，交叉引用 4. 最近一项研究揭示…… 5. 质疑……的观点 被质疑的观点 6. 彼此完全分开的 (adj.) 将……与……分开(v.) 7. 引发/ 提出关于……的疑问 8. 我们的心智能力如何相互关联 把你所学的知识与日常生活联系起来 与阅读相关的任务 9. 涉及/包含某事/做某事 参与，参加... 10. 反过来也一样，反之亦然
